news.t: Tortoise Capital Announces 2024 Closed-End Fund Tax Characterization of Distributions and Release of Combined Annual Report

overview.description: The Tortoise Electrification Infrastructure ETF (TPZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in income-producing equity and fixed income securities, primarily in power and energy infrastructure companies in the United States. TPZ was launched on Dec 23, 2024 and is issued by Tortoise.
